item.title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST
GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[read more]

GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB

GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[read more]

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST
GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.

item.title: Upscayl [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Upscayl [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Upscayl
(Graphic Apps)
Free and Open Source AI Image Upscaler. Upscayl lets you enlarge and enhance low-resolution images using advanced AI algorithms. Enlarge images without losing quality.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Upscayl
(Graphic Apps)
Free and Open Source AI Image Upscaler. Upscayl lets you enlarge and enhance low-resolution images using advanced AI algorithms. Enlarge images without losing quality.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Arduino IDE 2.x [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Arduino IDE 2.x [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Arduino IDE 2.x
(Developers Apps)
The Arduino IDE 2.x is a major rewrite, sharing no code with the IDE 1.x. It is based on the Theia IDE framework and built with Electron. The backend operations such as compilation and uploading are offloaded to an arduino-cli instance running in daemon mode. This new IDE was developed with the goal of preserving the same interface and user experience of the previous major version in order to provide a frictionless upgrade.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Arduino IDE 2.x
(Developers Apps)
The Arduino IDE 2.x is a major rewrite, sharing no code with the IDE 1.x. It is based on the Theia IDE framework and built with Electron. The backend operations such as compilation and uploading are offloaded to an arduino-cli instance running in daemon mode. This new IDE was developed with the goal of preserving the same interface and user experience of the previous major version in order to provide a frictionless upgrade.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arduino IDE 2.x
(Developers Apps)
The Arduino IDE 2.x is a major rewrite, sharing no code with the IDE 1.x. It is based on the Theia IDE framework and built with Electron. The backend operations such as compilation and uploading are offloaded to an arduino-cli instance running in daemon mode. This new IDE was developed with the goal of preserving the same interface and user experience of the previous major version in order to provide a frictionless upgrade.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: e2 SAT Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: e2 SAT Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
e2 SAT Editor
(Utilities)
e2 SAT Editor is a satellite channel lists editor, for Enigma2, Neutrino, dreambox lists. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Unix-like BSD) and free to use.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
e2 SAT Editor
(Utilities)
e2 SAT Editor is a satellite channel lists editor, for Enigma2, Neutrino, dreambox lists. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Unix-like BSD) and free to use.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
e2 SAT Editor
(Utilities)
e2 SAT Editor is a satellite channel lists editor, for Enigma2, Neutrino, dreambox lists. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Unix-like BSD) and free to use.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: sudo for High Sierra [Security]
item.itunes:title: sudo for High Sierra [Security]
item.itunes:author: Markospoko
item.itunes:summary:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.15p5 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for Mac's High Sierra with newer clang (I need to sometimes also use High Sierra but I found only sudo for Catalina+), it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources

packages here:
- sudo-1.9.*.pkg - that has the sudo command
- sudo-logsrvd-1.9.*.pkg - log server that accepts event and I/O logs from sudo

*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]
item.description:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.15p5 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for Mac's High Sierra with newer clang (I need to sometimes also use High Sierra but I found only sudo for Catalina+), it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources

packages here:
- sudo-1.9.*.pkg - that has the sudo command
- sudo-logsrvd-1.9.*.pkg - log server that accepts event and I/O logs from sudo

*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.15p5 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for Mac's High Sierra with newer clang (I need to sometimes also use High Sierra but I found only sudo for Catalina+), it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources

packages here:
- sudo-1.9.*.pkg - that has the sudo command
- sudo-logsrvd-1.9.*.pkg - log server that accepts event and I/O logs from sudo

*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]
